D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Wave Packet — Group vs Phase Velocity

tune dispersion and watch the envelope and carrier travel at different speeds

In a dispersive medium each frequency travels at its own phase velocity; the localised packet — the information — travels at the group velocity.

Slide the v_phase / v_group ratio. The gold envelope (group) moves at one speed; the crimson crest (phase) overtakes it (normal dispersion) or lags it (anomalous).
